sawaid_abbas.biography: Sawaid Abbas is an emerging researcher whose work spans earth science, ecology, environment, and climate change, powered by smart sensing, space technologies, and advanced spatial data science. He has conducted extensive research on forest resources mapping across Pakistan, Hong Kong, and Asia, with a strong focus on biomass estimation and carbon stock assessments. His decade-long investigation into tropical and subtropical secondary forest succession has garnered acclaim. He developed Pakistan's first comprehensive forest degradation and deforestation map. NASA's Landsat Science acknowledges his collaborative work on Mangrove Cover Change in South Asia. His work on Smart Sensing Technologies earned an Outstanding Achievement in Technology Transfer award from the Hong Kong Polytechnic University.
